news.title: The New Anthropic Tool That Could Change How Drugs Are Developed
news.description: Introducing Claude Science, the AI tool designed to expedite the discovery of promising new therapies. Anthropic will also use it in-house to pursue innovative treatments for ‘neglected’ diseases.
